Designing and implementing AI pipelines for knowledge-based and conversational applications
Exploring LLM integrations and prompt engineering to create intelligent, context-aware systems
Building scalable and modular AI architectures for real-world applications
Collaborating with the team to develop solutions that leverage cutting-edge AI frameworks and tools
Experimenting with LangChain and LangGraph to streamline development of AI-powered apps…

experience.title: Junior NLP Engineer
experience.description:
Worked as a Junior NLP Engineer, leading the development of a full-stack Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) platform enabling non-technical users to create and deploy AI chatbots.

Built an end-to-end RAG-based application using React, FastAPI, and Pinecone
Designed a user-friendly platform allowing non-technical users to create, customize, and deploy chatbots dynamically
Implemented document ingestion, chunking, embedding generation, and semantic retrieval pipelines
Integrated vector database (Pinecone) for efficient context retrieval and improved response accuracy
Developed scalable backend APIs for chatbot creation, management, and real-time interaction
Enabled multi-platform chatbot deployment including websites, embeddable widgets, and Slack integrations
Applied prompt engineering and context management techniques to reduce hallucinations and improve relevance
Collaborated on delivering a production-ready AI product with real-world usage…
